CVE-2024-43800.title: serve-static serves static files. serve-static passes untrusted u ...
CVE-2024-43800.description: serve-static serves static files. serve-static passes untrusted user input - even after sanitizing it - to redirect() may execute untrusted code. This issue is patched in serve-static 1.16.0.
